title: Kid Kirby
short_description: A cancelled SNES Kirby spin-off developed by DMA Design (later Rockstar North) for Nintendo.
description: Kid Kirby was a cancelled action game being developed by DMA Design (later known as Rockstar North) for Nintendo, as part of the studio's two-game contract with Nintendo for the SNES. The game would have featured a young version of Kirby controlled using the Super NES Mouse. Development was cancelled by Nintendo following poor sales of the Super NES Mouse peripheral.
